summary: Completed testing of Purchase Tracker page for Forge SaaS OS. Fixed critical React hooks order bug in CustomerDetailPanel. All 12 backend API tests pass. Frontend UI working correctly with KPI stat cards, Move Stage modal, and Customer View.

issues: Initial render shows 0 values briefly before SWR data loads - minor hydration mismatch warning in console

bugs_fixed.issue: React hooks order violation - useCustomerStageTotals was called after early return statement
bugs_fixed.fix: Moved useCustomerStageTotals hook call before the early return on line 41

critical_code_review_comments: React hooks must be called unconditionally at the top level of components - the useCustomerStageTotals hook was being called after an early return which violates Rules of Hooks
test_credentials: No auth required - mock dev user
seed_data_creation: Using existing PostgreSQL seed data (line-001 through line-011, po-001 through po-008, proj-001 through proj-007)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Purchase Tracker features verified working: KPI stat cards show correct DB values (Total Ordered=39, Pend. from Co.=24, At Godown=3, In Box=5, Dispatched=3), Move Stage modal opens and shows correct FROM/TO stage options with legal transitions, Customer View shows customer-scoped stage totals via SWR. Fixed React hooks order bug in CustomerDetailPanel.tsx. Zustand procurement-store still provides MOCKED data for CompanyView table rows and StatDrillDownPanel detail items.

features_verified.kpi_stat_cards: WORKING - Shows correct numbers from DB via SWR (Total Ordered=39, Pend. from Co.=24, At Godown=3, In Box=5, Dispatched=3)
features_verified.move_stage_modal: WORKING - Opens on Move button click, shows correct available qty and legal transition options
features_verified.move_stage_api: WORKING - PATCH /api/purchase-orders/lines/[id]/move-stage correctly validates and executes moves
features_verified.swr_revalidation: WORKING - revalidateAfterMove() called after successful move
features_verified.customer_panel_counts: WORKING - Shows correct stage counts from DB via SWR after hooks fix
features_verified.move_button_visibility: WORKING - Hidden when no legal transitions exist (hasLegalMoves check)

mocked_apis_note: Zustand procurement-store still provides MOCKED data for CompanyView table rows and StatDrillDownPanel detail items. The stat card counts and customer panel counts now come from the real PostgreSQL DB via SWR.
